instruction: How does the company handle technical debt?
output: Each sprint reserves 20% of capacity for technical debt reduction. Teams maintain a tech debt backlog in Jira with severity labels. P1 tech debt (security, stability risks) is prioritized above features. Quarterly tech debt reviews are held with engineering leadership.
text: <s>[INST] How does the company handle technical debt? [/INST] Each sprint reserves 20% of capacity for technical debt reduction. Teams maintain a tech debt backlog in Jira with severity labels. P1 tech debt (security, stability risks) is prioritized above features. Quarterly tech debt reviews are held with engineering leadership.</s>

instruction: How do I request a hardware upgrade?
output: Submit a hardware request through the IT portal. Standard laptops are refreshed every 3 years. Requests for additional monitors, peripherals, or early refreshes require manager approval. Budget items over €1,000 require VP approval. Delivery typically takes 5–10 business days.
text: <s>[INST] How do I request a hardware upgrade? [/INST] Submit a hardware request through the IT portal. Standard laptops are refreshed every 3 years. Requests for additional monitors, peripherals, or early refreshes require manager approval. Budget items over €1,000 require VP approval. Delivery typically takes 5–10 business days.</s>

instruction: What are the penalties for violating the data classification policy?
output: First offense: written warning plus mandatory training. Second offense: suspension of data access. Severe violations may result in termination and potential legal action.
text: <s>[INST] What are the penalties for violating the data classification policy? [/INST] First offense: written warning plus mandatory training. Second offense: suspension of data access. Severe violations may result in termination and potential legal action.</s>

instruction: What happens during my 30-60-90 day review?
output: At 30 days you set initial goals with your manager. At 60 days you give a New Hire Lightning Talk (15 min, any topic) and receive informal feedback. At 90 days you have a formal performance review marking the end of probation.
text: <s>[INST] What happens during my 30-60-90 day review? [/INST] At 30 days you set initial goals with your manager. At 60 days you give a New Hire Lightning Talk (15 min, any topic) and receive informal feedback. At 90 days you have a formal performance review marking the end of probation.</s>

instruction: What is the company VPN policy?
output: The VPN must be used for all remote access to company systems. Connect using the Cisco AnyConnect client with your corporate credentials. VPN access is provisioned automatically on Day 1. If you experience issues, contact it-helpdesk@acme.corp.
text: <s>[INST] What is the company VPN policy? [/INST] The VPN must be used for all remote access to company systems. Connect using the Cisco AnyConnect client with your corporate credentials. VPN access is provisioned automatically on Day 1. If you experience issues, contact it-helpdesk@acme.corp.</s>

instruction: What is the company's policy on using personal devices?
output: Personal devices must not be used to access, store, or process company data classified as CONFIDENTIAL or RESTRICTED. INTERNAL data may only be accessed on personal devices through approved mobile applications with MDM enrollment.
text: <s>[INST] What is the company's policy on using personal devices? [/INST] Personal devices must not be used to access, store, or process company data classified as CONFIDENTIAL or RESTRICTED. INTERNAL data may only be accessed on personal devices through approved mobile applications with MDM enrollment.</s>

instruction: How do I enroll in the pension plan?
output: You are automatically enrolled in the basic pension plan upon joining. To increase your contribution or change your investment options, log into the benefits portal at benefits.acme.corp or contact HR at hr-benefits@acme.corp.
text: <s>[INST] How do I enroll in the pension plan? [/INST] You are automatically enrolled in the basic pension plan upon joining. To increase your contribution or change your investment options, log into the benefits portal at benefits.acme.corp or contact HR at hr-benefits@acme.corp.</s>

output: The company's five core values are: 1) Trust — we communicate openly and honestly. 2) Excellence — we hold ourselves to high standards. 3) Collaboration — we achieve more together. 4) Innovation — we embrace change and new ideas. 5) Responsibility — we act ethically and sustainably.
text: <s>[INST] What are the company values? [/INST] The company's five core values are: 1) Trust — we communicate openly and honestly. 2) Excellence — we hold ourselves to high standards. 3) Collaboration — we achieve more together. 4) Innovation — we embrace change and new ideas. 5) Responsibility — we act ethically and sustainably.</s>

instruction: What equipment does the company provide for remote work?
output: The company provides a laptop (refreshed every 3 years), one external monitor, a one-time €500 home office budget, and a monthly internet stipend of €30.
text: <s>[INST] What equipment does the company provide for remote work? [/INST] The company provides a laptop (refreshed every 3 years), one external monitor, a one-time €500 home office budget, and a monthly internet stipend of €30.</s>

instruction: What should I do on my first day as a new hire?
output: On Day 1: pick up your laptop from IT (Building A, Room 102), set up corporate email and Slack, complete the mandatory 2-hour security awareness training, meet your manager for a welcome 1:1, sign the NDA and Code of Conduct, and set up VPN access.
text: <s>[INST] What should I do on my first day as a new hire? [/INST] On Day 1: pick up your laptop from IT (Building A, Room 102), set up corporate email and Slack, complete the mandatory 2-hour security awareness training, meet your manager for a welcome 1:1, sign the NDA and Code of Conduct, and set up VPN access.</s>

instruction: How do I request a reasonable accommodation?
output: Contact your HR Business Partner or submit a request through the HR portal under 'Accommodations'. Provide medical documentation if applicable. HR will work with you and your manager to implement appropriate accommodations. All requests are handled confidentially.
text: <s>[INST] How do I request a reasonable accommodation? [/INST] Contact your HR Business Partner or submit a request through the HR portal under 'Accommodations'. Provide medical documentation if applicable. HR will work with you and your manager to implement appropriate accommodations. All requests are handled confidentially.</s>
